seoTitle: Canley Heights vs Canobolas — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Canley Heights and Canobolas. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Canley Heights vs Canobolas: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Canley Heights and Canobolas.
heading: Canley Heights vs Canobolas — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Canley Heights, New South Wales and Canobolas, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Canobolas has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Canley Heights (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Canley Heights or Canobolas safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Canley Heights has a flood risk score of 50/100, while Canobolas scores 53/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Canley Heights scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. Canobolas scores 21/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Canley Heights or Canobolas?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Canobolas has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.15% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
